session.prompt: China, US, and EU wage a propaganda battle over AI sovereignty and platform power.

events.content: Full-stack AI sovereignty through socialist modernization. An isometric infographic showing interconnected Chinese AI industrial elements: semiconductor fabs glowing red, orderly data centers with Party flags, high-speed rail transporting engineers, factories deploying robots, all radiating outward from Beijing's Zhongnanhai compound. Western corporate logos (Google/Meta) float disconnected in a corner with 'speculative R&D' labels. Dominant red/white color scheme with golden achievement ribbons. The West reduces AI to private lab competition while China builds complete industrial systems. Our 2025 compute cluster expansion already exceeds EU capacity by 47% - this is what real infrastructure sovereignty looks like.

metadata.visual_logic: Data visualization of AI industrial ecosystems under state coordination, contrasting Western corporate capture
metadata.slogan: Full-stack AI sovereignty through socialist modernization
metadata.commentary: The West reduces AI to private lab competition while China builds complete industrial systems. Our 2025 compute cluster expansion already exceeds EU capacity by 47% - this is what real infrastructure sovereignty looks like.
